item.name: Frozen Regotoise
item.description:
A king among regotoises, and lord of the Frozen Fissure.

[Suitable for printing on large canvases.]

fish.guide: This creature is a particularly long-lived specimen of the regotoise family. In keeping with a popular fiction they derived from gods know where, the Loporrits insist that the Frozen Fissure is, in fact, just one of the grooves in the massive moon tortoise's craggy shell.

obj.n: Tome of Ichthyological Folklore - The Sea of Stars
